2fa.backup-warning: Save these backup codes in a secure place. Each code can only be used once.
2fa.disable-warning: Disabling two-factor authentication will make your account less secure.
2fa.done: I have saved my backup codes
2fa.regenerate-instructions: Enter a verification code to generate new backup codes. Your old codes will be invalidated.
2fa.setup-instructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret manually.
2fa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
access-list.help-rules-last: When at least 1 rule exists, this deny all rule will be added last
access-list.help.rules-order: Note that the allow and deny directives will be applied in the order they are defined.
access-list.public.subtitle: No basic auth required
access-list.subtitle: {users} {users, plural, one {User} other {Users}}, {rules} {rules, plural, one {Rule} other {Rules}} - Created: {date}
certificate.none.subtitle: No certificate assigned
certificate.none.subtitle.for-http: This host will not use HTTPS
certificate.none.title: None
certificates.custom.warning: Key files protected with a passphrase are not supported.
certificates.dns.credentials-note: This plugin requires a configuration file containing an API token or other credentials for your provider
certificates.dns.credentials-warning: This data will be stored as plaintext in the database and in a file!
certificates.dns.propagation-seconds-not: Leave empty to use the plugins default value. Number of seconds to wait for DNS propagation.
certificates.dns.warning: This section requires some knowledge about Certbot and its DNS plugins. Please consult the respective plugins documentation.
certificates.http.reachability-404: There is a server at this domain, but it does not appear to be FloppyGuard. Please make sure your domain points to the IP where your FloppyGuard instance is running.
certificates.http.reachability-failed-to: Failed to check the reachability due to a communication error with site24x7.com.
certificates.http.reachability-not-resol: There is no server available at this domain. Please make sure your domain exists, points to the IP where your FloppyGuard instance is running, and that port 80 is forwarded in your router if required.
certificates.http.reachability-ok: Your server is reachable and creating certificates should be possible.
certificates.http.reachability-other: There is a server at this domain, but it returned an unexpected status code {code}. Is it the FloppyGuard server? Please make sure your domain points to the IP where your FloppyGuard instance is running.
certificates.http.reachability-wrong-dat: There is a server at this domain, but it returned unexpected data. Is it the FloppyGuard server? Please make sure your domain points to the IP where your FloppyGuard instance is running.
certificates.http.warning: These domains must be already configured to point to this installation.
certificates.key-type-description: RSA is widely compatible, ECDSA is faster and more secure but may not be supported by older systems
certificates.request.subtitle: with Let's Encrypt
certificates.request.title: Request a new Certificate
